outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel starts a tense ceasefire in Lebanon, as Trump sounds optimistic on Iran talks
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire taking effect amid immediate violations. Trump signals talks could resume 'this weekend' in Islamabad.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 48 of Middle East conflict — Lebanon ceasefire aimed at halting Israel-Hezbollah conflict begins
outlets.summary: CNN live coverage of the Lebanon ceasefire, immediate violations, and continuing US blockade enforcement against Iran.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth warns Iranian leaders: 'Choose wisely,' US 'locked and loaded'
outlets.summary: Fox News highlights Hegseth's ultimatum to Iran. Defense Secretary warns US is ready to strike energy and electrical infrastructure if Iran refuses a deal.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Hegseth says US ready to restart attacks on Iran if they won't take deal
outlets.summary: Washington Times reports on Pentagon's aggressive posture toward Iran as blockade continues and ceasefire expiration looms April 22.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Ceasefire starts in Lebanon as Trump says Tehran deal close
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera live coverage of ceasefire violations, Antalya quad meeting, oil surge, and continuing blockade enforcement.

outlets.name: Reuters/Rappler
outlets.headline: Israel, Lebanon begin ceasefire; Trump says Iran may meet US this weekend
outlets.summary: Reuters wire via Rappler covers ceasefire commencement and Trump's hints at weekend talks in Islamabad.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: PM said to tell ministers he agreed to ceasefire at Trump's request — cabinet shocked
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reports ministers were furious after learning of the Lebanon ceasefire from media. Netanyahu held no cabinet vote.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump: War in Iran 'Should Be Ending Pretty Soon'; Lebanon ceasefire in effect
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Lebanon ceasefire violations, Israeli operations continuing, and Trump's optimistic rhetoric on ending the conflict.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Araghchi thanks Pakistan for hosting Iran-US talks as he receives army chief Asim Munir
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Araghchi's meeting with Pakistan's army chief in Tehran and framework discussions for second round of talks.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pakistan hopeful of 'major breakthrough' in Iran talks
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on Pakistani sources indicating progress on nuclear freeze duration, HEU disposition, and Hormuz control.
